name: Trafalgar Law - ST17-002 (Reprint)
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [On Play] You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand: If your Leader has the "The Seven Warlords of the Sea" type, return up to 1 Character with a cost of 4 or less to the owner's hand.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
